properties.title: Hazy and Shumates area

properties.title: Timbering in Dry Creek
properties.body_md: Many residents are also concerned about the impacts of timbering in the headwaters of the hollows. Residents of Dry Creek have already noticed an increased in flooding in the hollow, and are concerned about water levels rising even before the start of MTR operations.

properties.title: Flooding and blasting threats in Dorothy and Colcord
properties.body_md: The blasting will come within a half-mile of many of these communities, and will happen daily, up to two or three times per day.  Based on information provided in the permit applications, the mining is expected to last for 17 years.
